title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building control layers around AI coding agents, comprising an AI layer with rules, skills, and hooks for single sessions, and multi-session orchestration for scaling reliable agentic workflows. It represents the majority of what makes agents work effectively in production, distinct from the underlying model itself.
